title: Open GitHub issue for show trials feature

log.context: Open GitHub issue for show trials feature

Done. GitHub issue #66 created at https://github.com/bigclungus/bigclungus-meta/issues/66 and posted to Discord. The issue covers the trigger format, defendant/prosecutor/defense/judge roles, human vs AI defendant modes, tone direction ("show trials, flashier the better"), and implementation notes including the EXILE verdict hooking into the existing `status: ineligible` mechanism.
